name: claude-review
description: Open a full Claude coding workspace supervised by Codex, or run agentic Claude Opus-alias review passes with isolated read-only tool access.

interface.shortDescription: Full Claude coding workspace with inherited Codex supervision plus isolated review lanes
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Workspace & Review to open Claude Code as a full interactive coding worker while the active Codex model supervises, verifies, and reviews the result. The workspace can edit files, run commands, and execute tests under Claude's native permission prompts. Separate high-scrutiny, adversarial, deep multi-agent, and security review commands retain their read-only tool fences.
defaultPrompt: Open a full Claude coding workspace and supervise the implementation with the active Codex model.
Run an exhaustive deep adversarial review with sub-agent dispatch on the current diff.
Run a security-focused Claude review on the current diff and map findings to OWASP/CWE.
